creator: guru@unixarea.de
text:
I've installed the port wifi-firmware-mt76-kmod-20230310 which brings the following files to /boot/modules:

ls -ltr /boot/modules/mediatek_*
-r-xr-xr-x  1 root wheel  732496 28 mar.  15:29 /boot/modules/mediatek_WIFI_RAM_CODE_MT7961_1_bin.ko
-r-xr-xr-x  1 root wheel  839504 28 mar.  15:29 /boot/modules/mediatek_WIFI_RAM_CODE_MT7922_1_bin.ko
-r-xr-xr-x  1 root wheel  105072 28 mar.  15:29 /boot/modules/mediatek_WIFI_MT7961_patch_mcu_1_2_hdr_bin.ko
-r-xr-xr-x  1 root wheel  150512 28 mar.  15:29 /boot/modules/mediatek_WIFI_MT7922_patch_mcu_1_1_hdr_bin.ko
-r-xr-xr-x  1 root wheel 1722920 28 mar.  15:29 /boot/modules/mediatek_mt7916_wm_bin.ko
-r-xr-xr-x  1 root wheel  520392 28 mar.  15:29 /boot/modules/mediatek_mt7916_wa_bin.ko
-r-xr-xr-x  1 root wheel   21328 28 mar.  15:29 /boot/modules/mediatek_mt7916_rom_patch_bin.ko
-r-xr-xr-x  1 root wheel 1273496 28 mar.  15:29 /boot/modules/mediatek_mt7915_wm_bin.ko
-r-xr-xr-x  1 root wheel  128696 28 mar.  15:29 /boot/modules/mediatek_mt7915_wa_bin.ko
-r-xr-xr-x  1 root wheel  157200 28 mar.  15:29 /boot/modules/mediatek_mt7915_rom_patch_bin.ko

The system panics during boot with this screen saying some firmware file isn't there or can't be loaded:

http://www.unixarea.de/photo_5201901176319237875_y.jpg
